_comment: The current best BSC — the dynamic pointer every showcase figure regenerates from (swap this, rerun scripts/analysis/regen_figures.sh, and the canonical figure set follows). 'best' = the ratified operating point (k=32, lam=1e-3, renorm gauge) with the lowest pooled FVU at the largest training budget; frontier/off-point runs (other k, lam=0) stay out of contention.
notes: 0.9.6 pilot renorm cell (the F7-designating run; month block b595, weekday b862, atlas b1781). Expected to be superseded by the tranche-6 24M-token renorm cells the evening of 2026-07-19.
